Uploaded December 17th, 2025 by iventheassassin
Send a correction
Post Comment
Egg farm in Paineel
QuoteReply
# Jul 17 2012 at 12:15 PM Rating: Decent
stimey
28 posts
Slaughter snakes and kobold runts in the area. The re-spawn spot for the snakes is +1135 -335. There will spawn either 3 snakes or 3 runts after the last of the 3 has died about 5-10 seconds later the next 3 will spawn. Runts appear to be the rare spawn. A small aoe ability works great with /hidecorpse looted.

Edited, Jul 17th 2012 2:17pm by stimey
▲ Page top
Egg farm in Paineel
QuoteReply
# Nov 30 2022 at 8:39 AM Rating: Decent
araisfeld
Scholar
161 posts
This spot is fantastic. Thank you!
▲ Page top
Eggs
QuoteReply
# Aug 23 2010 at 4:40 PM Rating: Decent
twoma
Scholar
110 posts
Blightfire Moors near CR has lots of snakes. 80% drop and egg and 10% of those roughly drop 2
▲ Page top
snake eggs off spiders?
QuoteReply
# Jan 17 2010 at 8:46 AM Rating: Good
missleta
Scholar
78 posts
the crevice spiderlings in CR do not drop snake eggs, they drop spider eggs LOL
▲ Page top
Snake eggs
QuoteReply
# Oct 03 2006 at 11:12 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1620606238987
View User Forum
Scholar
40 posts
I just found out, by experimenting, that if you combine a snake egg with a water flask in an oven. the result is:
Hard Boiled Snake Egg. this is a snack that trivials at 27.

New info for those looking for something to train fast in baking.

I have not seen it either here or anywhere else, so i thought i would post the info!!
▲ Page top
Snake eggs
QuoteReply
# Oct 03 2006 at 12:17 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1661732332556
Guru
6,998 posts
BaliniaPathtaker wrote:
I just found out, by experimenting, that if you combine a snake egg with a water flask in an oven. the result is:
Hard Boiled Snake Egg. this is a snack that trivials at 27.

New info for those looking for something to train fast in baking.

I have not seen it either here or anywhere else, so i thought i would post the info!!


Do me a big favor and upload that item to Lucy so we can enter it into the system. Thanks!

A Moss Snake in the Paineel newbie zone just dropped three snake eggs, and another dropped two! Woot!
▲ Page top
EGGS
QuoteReply
# Jan 01 2005 at 4:42 PM Rating: Decent
MIKELOGAN
9 posts
Where can I buy unlimited eggs?
▲ Page top
RE: EGGS
QuoteReply
# Jan 02 2005 at 5:13 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1683505057533
Sage
672 posts
As suggested by previous posters, Dar Forager Lumun seems to be the only known vendor of eggs of any kind. Unfortunately his supply is limited to 10 eggs a spawn.

If you want to farm your eggs, I'd recommend to read one of these threads at EQTraders :
Where do you go for eggs ?
Eggs - the 1st
Eggs - the 2nd




Edited, Sun Jan 2 05:14:59 2005
▲ Page top
Vendor
QuoteReply
# Mar 13 2004 at 11:28 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592253623705
123 posts
Dar Forager Lumun (Foraged Supplies) sells snake eggs for 5cp in Gukta.

They are the 1st item in his/her (don't ask me how to sex frogs) inventory so are not there just as a result of being sold to him/her.

Dar Forager Lumun wanders around near the entrance.
▲ Page top
RE: Vendor
QuoteReply
# May 02 2004 at 10:18 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591806236838
11 posts
The new targeting system allows you to determine sex. It says something like "Targeted blah blah. Use right-click to consider him/her/it".

# Mar 28 2004 at 7:12 AM Rating: Decent

1 post
I tried to buy a whole stack of eggs from him, when I did, he only sold me 10 and then de-spawned... Whats up with that?
▲ Page top
RE: Vendor
QuoteReply
# May 01 2004 at 11:24 PM Rating: Decent
Severrian
373 posts
Most likely he has a limited supply and you also just happened to be buying right as he despawned.

▲ Page top
Used in
QuoteReply
# Oct 02 2003 at 3:32 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593966339725
Scholar
57 posts
Also used in Baking. Combine in a Mixing Bowl with a Cup of Flour and a Bottle of Milk with the Egg to make a Clump of Dough.
